can_v10.02

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference can_v10_02_20110126T152836.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 00
Receive ID 00
Functional Addr 00
Functional Name CAN
